## Related issue

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated (parser changes should include a minimal HDL
      fixture in `tests/fixtures/`)
